subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Turn thy face toward God, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, the Book proclaimeth and saith: "O Chosen One! Arise!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد ول وجهک شطر الله المهیمن القیوم ان الکتاب ینادی و یقول یا مصطفی قم
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
